# pheno-tracing

> Port-driven distributed tracing crate. Canonical tracing substrate
> for the pheno-* fleet (ADR-012).

## Files

- `Cargo.toml` — package manifest (v0.1.0)
- `src/lib.rs` — library root (re-exports TracePort, TraceOperation, etc.)
- `src/port.rs` — TracePort trait + types (TraceOperation, TraceResult, SpanId, TraceId, SpanKind)
- `src/adapters.rs` — concrete trace adapters (impls of TracePort)
- `tests/port_integration.rs` — port integration tests
- `tests/adapter_tests.rs` — adapter contract tests
- `AGENTS.md` — agent context
- `WORKLOG.md` — change history (v2.1 schema)
- `CHANGELOG.md` — release notes
- `LICENSE-MIT` — MIT license

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`)
- 80% lib coverage gate
- Hexagonal pattern: TracePort trait + Adapter impl (ADR-014)
- `tracing` 0.1 + `tracing-subscriber` 0.3 for the underlying engine
- `async-trait` for the trait abstraction
